heading: Definitions
label: 505a Definitions
notes: References in TextSections 505a to 505a–2 of this title, referred to in text, was in the original “this part”, which was translated as reading “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle G of title VIII of , which is classified generally to sections 505a to 505a–2 of this title, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. Subtitle G of title VIII of does not contain parts.Pub. L. 116–9Pub. L. 116–9

children.label: i
children.text: Capitalized facilities, buildings, structures, project features, power production equipment, recreation facilities, or quarters.

children.label: ii
children.text: Capitalized and noncapitalized heavy equipment and other installed equipment.

children.heading: Inclusions
children.label: B Inclusions
children.text: The term “asset” includes assets described in subparagraph (A) that are considered to be mission critical.

children.label: A
children.text: the annual plan prepared by the Bureau known as the “Asset Management Plan”; and

children.label: B
children.text: any publicly available information relating to the plan described in subparagraph (A) that summarizes the efforts of the Bureau to evaluate and manage infrastructure assets of the Bureau.

children.heading: Major repair and rehabilitation need
children.label: 3 Major repair and rehabilitation need
children.text: The term “major repair and rehabilitation need” means major nonrecurring maintenance at a Reclamation facility, including maintenance related to the safety of dams, extraordinary maintenance of dams, deferred major maintenance activities, and all other significant repairs and extraordinary maintenance.
